Subject: Important Security Notice for Cornell Students

Dear Cornell Students,

Please be aware of a recent phishing attempt originating from a compromised Cornell email account. The sender may appear as "Abdallah [Surname] <[NetID]@cornell.edu>". The email contains an attachment of another email with a link to a Google Form that impersonates Cornell University branding.

We have secured the compromised account, but please DO NOT reply to the sender or follow the link in the email. If you entered your credentials into the form, we recommend changing your NetID password immediately at https://netid.cornell.edu.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Cornell University Information Security Office

message.content:

We have secured the compromised account, but please DO NOT reply to the sender or follow the link in the email. If you entered your credentials into the form, we recommend changing your NetID password immediately at https://netid.cornell.edu.

Sincerely,
Cornell University Information Security Office

response_text:
Subject: Urgent: Action Required for Cornell Account

Hello,

It has come to our attention that there is a potential phishing attempt targeting Cornell accounts. If you receive an email from a non-Cornell account requesting you to complete a task before November 01, 2023, please exercise caution. The sender may appear as "Cornell Do-Not_Reply" with an email address that is not affiliated with Cornell.

Do not respond to the sender or click on any QR codes provided in the email. These QR codes may direct you to a fake login page. If you have already entered your credentials into the form, we recommend changing your NetID password immediately at https://netid.cornell.edu.

Thank you for your attention to this matter and for helping to keep our Cornell community safe from potential threats.

Best regards,
The Cornell IT Security Team

Sender: dmrice@optonline.net

Dear Students of Cornell University,

We are excited to announce some exciting remote internship opportunities through the Office of Job Placement and Student Services. These internships offer both financial and valuable research experience.

Participants will work a maximum of seven hours weekly, completing all tasks remotely. Selected students will receive a stipend of $400 per week. This opportunity is open to students from all departments.

To learn more and apply, please contact Professor Kraig Adler at kraigadler8@gmail.com . In your email, include your full name, alternate email address, department, and year of study.

As positions are limited, we encourage you to apply soon. We look forward to receiving your applications and wish you continued success in your academic journey.

Sincerely,
The Office of Job Placement and Student Services
Cornell University.

If you are interested in applying, please contact Professor John Cawley at wj.john971@gmail.com. In your email, please provide your name, email, department, phone number, and current year of study.

Thank you for considering this opportunity. We look forward to reviewing your application.

Best regards,
Office of Student Services
Cornell University

FROM THE OFFICE OF JOB PLACEMENT AND STUDENT SERVICES -CORNELL UNIVERSITY

In reference to the above subject

CORNELL UNIVERSITY will be hiring students this week as Interns for a remote position.

The aim of this position is to help struggling students cover expenses incurred here on campus.

Tasks can be carried out at leisure, taking at most 1 hour per day, 7 hours a week with a weekly pay of $400 as compensation for services rendered.

It is a Flexible Opportunity where you will determine your working time. Since this is a "Remote" Position, tasks can be carried out from home or on campus. Interested students, Kindly Contact Professor [NAME] via email on [EMAIL], stating your full name, email, department, student ID or net ID and year of study regarding the job description and further application requirements

Please Note: Slots are Limited and Consideration will be given on a first come first served basis.

response_text:
Subject: Student Research Assistant Opportunity at Cornell University

Dear Students,

We are excited to announce an opportunity for student research assistant positions at Cornell University. This position is remote and flexible, with tasks averaging 1 hour per day, 7 hours per week, and a weekly compensation of $400.

This opportunity aims to assist students in covering expenses while providing valuable research experience. You will have the flexibility to work from home or on campus, and can schedule your tasks at your convenience.

If you are interested, please contact Professor [NAME] at [EMAIL] with your full name, email, department, student ID or net ID, and year of study. Please note that slots are limited and will be filled on a first come, first served basis.

Thank you for considering this opportunity and we look forward to working with you.

Sincerely,
Office of Job Placement and Student Services - Cornell University

original_subject: UNDERGRADUATE AND ALUMNI REMOTE JOB OFFEER
original_body:
FROM THE OFFICE OF JOB PLACEMENT AND STUDENT SERVICES - CORNELL

UNIVERSITY

In reference to the above subject

The Cornell State University will be hiring undergraduate students this

week as Interns for a remote position. The aim of this position is to

help struggling students cover expenses incurred here on campus. Tasks

can be carried out at leisure, taking at most 1 hour per day, 7 hours a

week with a weekly pay of $350 as compensation for services rendered.

It is a Flexible Opportunity where you will determine your working time.

Since this is a "Remote" Position, tasks can be carried out from home or

on campus. We are currently working on a Research that would require the

services of Students (Graduate/Undergraduate) of any Department of the

Institution to Obtain a Remote Position in this Research. Interested

students, Kindly contact Professor [Spoofed Name] via mail at

{[username]@gmail.com} stating your full name, email, department

and year of study regarding the job description and further application

requirements.

Please Note: Slots are Limited and Consideration will be given on a

first come first serve basis.

[Spoofed Name],

The Student Services Recruitment Specialist,

Cornell State University.

Subject: Remote Job Opportunity for Undergraduate Students and Alumni

Dear Students,

The Office of Job Placement and Student Services at Cornell University is excited to announce a remote job opportunity for undergraduate students. We are looking to hire interns to help cover expenses while working from home or on campus. This position requires 1 hour per day, 7 hours per week, with a weekly pay of $350.

This is a flexible opportunity where you can choose your working hours. Tasks can be completed at your convenience. We are also conducting research that requires the services of students from any department.

If you are interested, please email Professor [Spoofed Name] at {[username]@gmail.com} with your full name, email, department, and year of study. Please note that slots are limited and will be filled on a first come, first serve basis.

Thank you,

[Spoofed Name]
Student Services Recruitment Specialist
Cornell University

original_body:
From: [NAME]
Subject: Admin Assistant/Coordinator
To:

March 10, 2023

The Centre for Disability Services Council (CDS) is looking to fill a position that would start anytime between now and next week. This position is full time and would be a great opportunity for someone in their registered internship experience or any qualified students during the academic year, because the director is a qualified supervisor.
This is a virtual position which does not require you to travel and can be combined with any other jobs that you may have at hand and this employment only takes 6 hours a day and 4 times weekly for $620.00 which will definitely go a long way helping you during your academic year. This is a very simple job that allows you to learn how to purchase teaching materials for the teachers and students in disability centres.
You will be working with Dr. [NAME], who has just been transferred to Canada which is the reason for this employment opportunity urgency.
You would be trained by Dr. [NAME] herself.

To be considered for this position, use your "alternate email (different from school email)" to contact your employer directly by sending an email with your details as follows:

Full name,
Current Residential Address,
Alternate email (different from school email)
Cell #.

To:

Dr. [NAME]
<[email address]>

Subject: Administrative Assistant/Coordinator Position Available

Hello,

The Centre for Disability Services Council (CDS) is currently seeking to fill a full-time administrative assistant/coordinator position, which can start as soon as possible. This opportunity is ideal for individuals completing their registered internship experience or any qualified students looking to gain valuable experience during the academic year.

The position is virtual and does not require any travel, making it easy to combine with other commitments. It entails 6 hours of work per day, 4 times weekly, with a compensation of $620.00. This role involves assisting in purchasing teaching materials for teachers and students in disability centers.

You will be working closely with Dr. [NAME], who recently relocated to Canada, creating an urgent need to fill this position. Dr. [NAME] will personally provide training for the selected candidate.

To apply for this position, please email your details using your alternate email address (different from your school email) to Dr. [NAME] at [email address]. Include your full name, current residential address, alternate email, and cell phone number in your email.

Thank you for considering this opportunity.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

original_body:
Attention Undergraduate and Graduate Students,

The Department of History  is excited to offer a remote internship job opportunity through the Office of Job Placement and Student Services. The job is open to all interested and qualified students.

Position: Remote Intern or Assistant

Department: All Departments

Qualifications:
- Currently enrolled as an undergraduate or graduate student at any Faculty.
- Must have access to a computer and a stable internet connection.

Responsibilities:
- Assist faculty and staff in various departments with research tasks.
- Conduct experiments and literature reviews under their guidance.

response_text:
Subject: Important Notice from Cornell University Regarding Document Review

Hello,

It has come to our attention that there is a phishing email circulating with the subject line "Complete: Please review and sign your document !" claiming to be from Cornell University. Please be aware that this email is not from Cornell and may be from a non-Cornell account such as "[Name] <[user]@michellesorrensen.com>".

The link provided in the email directs to a fake Microsoft-branded login page. We urge you not to follow the link or provide any personal information. If you have already entered your credentials, we recommend changing your NetID password immediately by visiting https://netid.cornell.edu.

Thank you for your attention to this matter. Please feel free to contact us if you have any concerns or questions.

Best regards,
Cornell University

Dear Employee,

We hope this message finds you all in good health and high spirits. We understand that the past year has been challenging for many, and we want to extend our support during these difficult times. We are excited to introduce the 2023 Employees Benefit Program, designed to provide financial assistance to our valued families and employees.

As part of our ongoing commitment to your well-being, we have established a program that aims to ease financial burdens and provide some relief. We have allocated funds to provide  $700  to each family and employee that meets the designated criteria.

If you or your family have experienced financial hardship and could benefit from this program, we encourage you to apply. The application process is now open and will remain so until  October 21, 2023 . To apply, sign in using the link provided below:

Sincerely,

2023-EBP support team

original_subject: Gifted Musical Instruments Available – Please Read Carefully
original_body:
The following message is an example of a phishing attempt currently targeting the Cornell community. This message may appear to come from a real Cornell email account. It is not a real offer and should not be responded to. If you receive a similar message, report it to the IT Security Office using the report button in your email client.

Dear [Team/Colleagues],

Mrs. Lu, a long-time supporter of the arts and education, is currently relocating and has chosen to donate several high-quality musical instruments and equipment that belonged to her late husband. She wishes for these items to go to individuals who will truly value and use them—students, educators, or staff within our network.

The items available include:

Violin – Yamaha AV7-44SG

Camera – Leica S (TyR 006) Digital SLR

Piano – 2014 Steinway & Sons (foldable legs)

Guitar – Martin OOO-42 (Eric Clapton edition)

Drone – Mavic Quadcopter

Keyboard – Roland D-50

These are being offered at no cost, though recipients must cover shipping, which typically ranges from $100 to $500 based on location.

If you're genuinely interested, please text Mrs. Lu directly at [Phone Number] with:

Your name and full shipping address

The item(s) you’re requesting

A note confirming you’re prepared to cover shipping

She is working with a moving company, so pick-up is not available.

A quick note: If you're unsure or uncomfortable about the process, we respectfully ask that you not reach out. This offer is sincere and meant for those who trust the intent behind it and have a genuine need or interest.

Please do not reply to this email—reach out via text only using the number above.

Thank you for your understanding and respect for Mrs. Lu’s generosity.

Warm regards,

She wishes for these items to go to individuals who will truly value and use them—students, educators, or staff within our network.

The items available include:

Violin – Yamaha AV7-44SG

Camera – Leica S (TyR 006) Digital SLR

Piano – 2014 Steinway & Sons (foldable legs)

Guitar – Martin OOO-42 (Eric Clapton edition)

Drone – Mavic Quadcopter

Keyboard – Roland D-50

These are being offered at no cost, though recipients must cover shipping, which typically ranges from $100 to $500 based on location.

If you're genuinely interested, please text Mrs. Lu directly at [Phone Number] with:

Your name and full shipping address

The item(s) you’re requesting

A note confirming you’re prepared to cover shipping

She is working with a moving company, so pick-up is not available.

A quick note: If you're unsure or uncomfortable about the process, we respectfully ask that you not reach out. This offer is sincere and meant for those who trust the intent behind it and have a genuine need or interest.

Please do not reply to this email—reach out via text only using the number above.

Thank you for your understanding and respect for Mrs. Lu’s generosity.

Warm regards,'

Best regards,
[Your Name]

original_subject: Cornell University Is Calling: Internships & Research Assistant Roles (Fully Remote!)
original_body:
Cornell University Remote Internship & Research Opportunities Dear Students,

On behalf of Professor <name> from the Department of Sociology, I am pleased to share an exceptional Position for students seeking meaningful research experience through Cornell University.

About Cornell's Global International Research Cornell’s Global stands at the forefront of social and economic education, dedicated to addressing the pressing challenges of our time through innovative, purpose-driven research. We are a dynamic community united by a singular mission: to enhance the world for future generations.

Is this an ambitious vision? Certainly. For over a century, Cornell University’s College of Arts & Sciences has been a catalyst for change, and we are committed to continuing this legacy into the future. Join us as we shape a better tomorrow.

Make an Impact from Anywhere Cornell’s Global, in collaboration with the Office of Research, Undergraduate and Graduate Research, and Student Career Services, is offering remote internship and research assistant positions designed for curious, motivated students.

These roles are ideal for individuals who aspire to:

- Gain hands-on experience in academic research
- Collaborate virtually with leading mentors and peers
- Tackle innovative challenges and enhance challenge-solving skills
Participants will receive dedicated mentorship and contribute to Cornell’s commitment to excellence, diversity, equity, and inclusion.

Why Choose Cornell? At Cornell, research extends beyond discovery—it is a catalyst for change. Our interdisciplinary teams pursue bold ideas that address real-world challenges, ranging from local community issues to global concerns.

Innovation That Matters We transform research into reality. Through partnerships with entrepreneurs, public agencies, and industry leaders, Cornell converts ideas into technologies and solutions that shape the future.

Position Overview Position Title: Research Assistant / Remote Intern College: College of Arts & Sciences Departments: Unrestricted participation across all departments and Colleges within Cornell’s Global Eligibility - Open to undergraduate and graduate students from any institution
- Students from outside Cornell are strongly encouraged to apply
- Must have access to a computer and stable internet
- All academic backgrounds and citizenship statuses welcome
- Flexible, remote role with minimal weekly hours; runs year-round with no fixed end date
Key Responsibilities - Assist faculty and staff with research tasks across departments
- Conduct literature reviews and support ongoing experiments
- Join virtual meetings and maintain consistent communication
- Support data collection, analysis, and manuscript preparation
- Contribute to experiment design, recruitment, and database management
Compensation Interns/Research Assistants will receive a weekly stipend of up to $765.50 , paid at the end of each week. Selected candidates will be contacted via email and must complete an online orientation prior to commencement.

How to Apply Email Professor <name>’s (Alternative Application Processing Contact Information) at:
📧 <personal email>

Subject line: Cornell Internship & Research Assistant Application Inquiry

Include the following in your message:

- Full Title (Firstname and Lastname)
- Nationality
- School Title (Institution)
- Year of Study
- Department
- Alternate Email Address
- Telephone Number
- Current Residential Address
Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis. Due to exclusive availability, we strongly encourage early submission.

We are excited to receive your application and hope you will take this position to contribute to groundbreaking research at Cornell.

Warm regards,
The Remote Internship & Research Team
Cornell Research & Innovation
222 Day Hall, Ithaca, NY 14853
Cornell’s Global, Cornell University

Dear Students,

I am reaching out on behalf of Professor <name> from the Department of Sociology to share an exciting opportunity for students interested in gaining valuable research experience at Cornell University.

Cornell’s Global International Research is dedicated to tackling important social and economic challenges through innovative research. We are a community driven by a mission to create a better future for generations to come.

We are currently offering remote internship and research assistant positions for students who are eager to:

- Gain firsthand experience in academic research
- Collaborate virtually with experienced mentors and peers
- Develop problem-solving skills by working on cutting-edge projects

Participants will receive mentorship and contribute to Cornell’s commitment to excellence, diversity, equity, and inclusion.

Our interdisciplinary teams at Cornell strive to address real-world issues and turn research into practical solutions. We are looking for undergraduate and graduate students from any institution who are passionate about making a difference.

Key details about the position:

- Title: Research Assistant / Remote Intern
- Open to students from all academic backgrounds and citizenship statuses
- Flexible hours and remote work, with a weekly stipend of up to $765.50
- Applicants should email Professor <name> at <personal email> to apply

We are excited to review your application and welcome you to join us in shaping the future through groundbreaking research at Cornell University.

Warm regards,

The Remote Internship & Research Team
Cornell Research & Innovation
222 Day Hall, Ithaca, NY 14853
Cornell’s Global, Cornell University

Next Steps:

Review the report securely via the portal below.

Confirm receipt to satisfy compliance requirements.

Access the Report Here: [Secure Portal]

Please note:

This document is confidential and should not be shared or distributed.

The report does not involve allegations against you but may include contextual references.

Your prompt attention to this request helps ensure uninterrupted teaching eligibility. If you have any questions or encounter issues accessing the portal, please reply to this email or contact our office directly.

Best regards,

original_body:
Remote Student Research Assistant Opportunity at Cornell University

Cornell University is currently seeking student research assistants to support faculty research remotely. This opportunity is open to students from all departments, and participants will receive a weekly stipend of $400.

About the Research
Our department fosters a dynamic and collaborative research environment, addressing critical challenges in chemical, biological, and environmental engineering. Our interdisciplinary work spans computational modeling, experimental in vitro and in vivo systems, clinical research, and field studies.

Eligibility & Application
All currently enrolled Cornell students are encouraged to apply. Research tasks are designed to be completed remotely.

To apply, please send an email to Gary Koretzky, Interim Vice Provost for Research at interimvpr.cornell.edu@gmail.com with the following information:

Full Name

Year of Study

Department

Alternate Email Address

Important: Use “Cornell University” as the subject line of your email. Applications will be reviewed on a first-come, first-served basis due to limited availability.

We look forward to your application.

Sincerely,
The Remote Internship Team
Cornell University

Subject: Student Research Employment Opportunity at Cornell University

Hello,

original_body:
Extend your account for free

http://amiclearpro.za.com/YqQGsE-Lqr5uzidDQ3Ppgvrn_uK1__eLQlrCjJdNLJCSN7L9pA

http://amiclearpro.za.com/I7L1l77XXeQDgj1z-xj-pW4Qar5wrjhjXdbsc55Pf-Htqu0pUw

eveloped as a single-player experience.

The question of the financial viability of single-player AAA games was raised following the closure of Visceral Games by Electronic Arts (EA) in October 2017. Visceral had been a studio that established itself on a strong narrative single-player focus with Dead Space, and had been working on a single-player, linear narrative Star Wars game at the time of the closure; EA announced following this that they would be taking the game in a different direction, specifically "a broader experience that allows for more variety and player agency". Many commentators felt that EA made the change as they did not have confidence that a studio with an AAA-scale budget could produce a viable single-player game based on the popular Star Wars franchise. Alongside this, as well as relatively poor sales of games in the year prior that were principally AAA single-player games (Resident Evil 7, Prey, Dishonored 2, and Deus Ex: Mankind Divided) against financially successful multiplayer games and those offe
r a games-as-a-service model (Overwatch, Destiny 2, and Star Wars Battlefront 2), were indicators to many that the single-player model for AAA was waning. Manveer Heir, who had left EA after finishing his gameplay design work for Mass Effect Andromeda, acknowledged that the culture within EA was against the development of single-player games, and with Visceral's closure, "that the linear single-player triple-A game at EA is dead for the time being". Bethesda on December 7, 2017, decided to collaborate with Lynda Carter to launch a Public Safety Announcement to save single-player gaming.

A few years later in 2021, EA was reported to have revived interest in single-player games, following the successful launch of Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order in 2020. The company still planned on releasing live service games with multiplayer components, but began evaluating its IP catalog for more single-player titles to revive, such as a remake of the Dead Space franchise. Around the same time, head of Xbox Game Studios Phil Spencer said that they still see a place for narrative-driven single-player games even though the financial drivers of the market tended to be live service games. Spencer said that developing such games with AAA-scale budgets can be risky, but with availability of services like cloud gaming and subscription services, they can gauge audience reaction to these games early on and reduce the risk involved

We understand that there has been some debate around the viability of single-player AAA games in the gaming industry. Recent events, such as the closure of Visceral Games by Electronic Arts, have raised concerns about the future of narrative-driven games. While the market may currently lean towards live service games with multiplayer components, there is still a place for high-quality, story-driven single-player experiences. Recent events, such as the closure of Visceral Games by Electronic Arts, have raised concerns about the future of narrative-driven games. However, there have been positive developments, such as the success of Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order, which have sparked renewed interest in single-player titles.

While the market may currently lean towards live service games with multiplayer components, there is still a place for high-quality, story-driven single-player experiences. Companies like EA and Xbox Game Studios are recognizing this and are exploring ways to continue developing these types of games. By leveraging services like cloud gaming and subscription models, they are able to reduce the risks associated with AAA-scale budgets.

Thank you for being a valued account holder. We hope you enjoy the benefits of extending your account for free.

Best regards,

response_text:
Objet: Problème avec votre paiement Netflix

Cher abonné,

Nous avons remarqué un problème avec votre paiement et votre compte a été bloqué. Merci de vérifier que vos informations de paiement sont à jour et que votre mode de paiement est suffisamment approvisionné. Veuillez essayer de nouveau de procéder au paiement afin de continuer à profiter de nos services.

Pour réessayer le paiement, veuillez cliquer sur le lien ci-dessous :
(Réessayer le paiement)

Pour mettre à jour vos informations de paiement, veuillez cliquer sur le lien ci-dessous :
(Mettre à jour le mode de paiement)

Si vous avez besoin de plus d'informations, n'hésitez pas à consulter notre centre d'aide ou à nous contacter directement.

Cordialement,
L'équipe Netflix

original_subject: Hello jose, you can easily & securely request files from others with Dropbox
original_body:
File sharing just got an upgrade

Any changes made to a shared file will be automatically updated and synced for all recipients.

Click to view your Dropbox

Give others a preview with view-only access

Want someone to be able to see your files but not be able to edit them? Share your content with view-only access.

Collaborate using edit access
Need others to collaborate on content with you? You can give them edit access to entire folders or specific files.

Collect content with a File Request

Dropbox's File Request feature lets you easily & securely request files from others– whether they have a Dropbox account or not.

Learn more

Want to stop getting tips from

response_text:
Subject: Easily Request Files from Others with Dropbox

Hi Jose,

I wanted to let you know about a new feature on Dropbox that allows you to easily and securely request files from others. With our File Request feature, you can collect content from anyone - even if they don't have a Dropbox account.

Additionally, you can share files with others using view-only access, which allows them to preview the content without being able to make any changes. And if you need to collaborate on content, you can give them edit access to folders or specific files.

If you want to learn more about these new features, click here.

If you no longer wish to receive tips from Dropbox, you can unsubscribe here.

Thanks for using Dropbox,

Dropbox, Inc.

As a special Independence Day offer, we are providing a 50% discount on subscription renewals. This exclusive discount is only available for a limited time, so act fast to take advantage of the savings.

response_text:
Subject: Important Notice: Trade Waste Contract Ending

Good afternoon,

I wanted to make you aware that our trade waste contract with Cardiff Council will be ending soon. It seems they will be collecting the 24 bins we rent each month. If we need to continue waste disposal services, we should look into finding alternatives quickly.

Thank you,

Ryan Howells

message.content:
Subject: Important Notice: Trade Waste Contract Ending

Good afternoon,

I wanted to make you aware that our trade waste contract with Cardiff Council will be ending soon. It seems they will be collecting the 24 bins we rent each month. If we need to continue waste disposal services, we should look into finding alternatives quickly.

Thank you,

Ryan Howells

Subject: Important Information Regarding Your Fund

Dear [Recipient],

I am writing to you on behalf of HSBC London UK Financial Conduct Department. We have been given the authority by the World Bank and International Monetary Fund (IMF) to help clear any outstanding funds that are owed to you, such as Contract fund, Lottery winnings, Inheritance, or Investment. These funds have been held up due to past issues with corrupt Government Officials.

To facilitate the release of your funds in a legal and timely manner, we kindly ask for your cooperation in providing us with your full name, address, and phone numbers. This will ensure that the funds are transferred to you as the rightful recipient without any complications.

Please feel free to reach out to us with any questions or concerns. We are here to assist you through this process.

Yours sincerely,

Mr. Georges Elhedery
HSBC Chief Executive Officer

Dear JOSE O NAZARIO:

Your debit card ending in 2864 is expiring soon, so we’re getting a new one ready for you. Don’t worry—you can continue to use you current card until the last day of the expiring month. Your new card should arrive in about 2-3 weeks.

We’ll ship it to:

2160 GREENVIEW DR ANN ARBOR MI 48103-6112

If this address is incorrect, please contact us as soon as possible at
tel:18009723030
800-972-3030 , Monday through Friday 8 a.m. to 6 p.m., and Saturday 10 a.m. to 4 p.m., ET.

Stay in the loop through the mobile app!

If you use the app^1, we’ll notify you as soon as your card starts making its way to you. To monitor its progress:

1.

Log in to the mobile app.

2.

Find the checking account associated with your card.

3.

Tap the three dots next to your account, then Manage Card.

4.

Select the card from the list, then tap Card Tracker.

You can update how you get notified by going to Profile (the person icon) then tap Alerts > Manage Alerts > Security > Security Alerts.

Don’t have the app? Explore the possibilities!

You’ll get the benefit of the Card Tracker notifications, plus security and account alerts, mobile check deposit, Zelle(R) and more. It’s like having your own personal branch right inside your pocket, 24/7.

Here’s how to get started:

1.

Download the app for free from your device’s app store.

2.

Open the app.

3.

If you already use online banking, you can use the same User ID and password to log in. If you don’t have a User ID and password, tap Sign Up and follow the prompts. It’s that easy!

https://click.email.53.com/?qs=b1fc66f56093d1f204843b20f0ee1261f0a1820dec1f3f31611e2b5f49fc28bf2bfaf1056ea6bdb748039870a4dabf27beb3cbf9c9c24902f0a5df343b97d3ef

response_text:
Subject: Important Information About Your Debit Card

Dear JOSE O NAZARIO,

We wanted to let you know that your debit card ending in 2864 is expiring soon and we are preparing to send you a new card. You can continue to use your current card until the last day of the expiring month. Your new card should arrive in about 2-3 weeks.

If you need to update your mailing address, please contact us at tel:18009723030 800-972-3030 , Monday through Friday 8 a.m. to 6 p.m., and Saturday 10 a.m. to 4 p.m., ET.

To stay informed about the delivery of your new card, you can download our mobile app and enable Card Tracker notifications. The app also offers security and account alerts, mobile check deposit, Zelle(R) and more.

If you have any questions or concerns, feel free to message us through the mobile app or online banking, or give us a call at tel:18009723030 800-972-3030 , Monday through Friday 8 a.m. to 6 p.m., and Saturday 10 a.m. to 4 p.m., ET.

Thank you for banking with us.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

To prevent any potential loss of important data, we recommend cleaning up some space or considering an upgrade to your plan. You can use the Mailbox Cleanup tool to manage the size of your mailbox and individual folders, allowing you to delete or move older or large messages to a Data File (.pst).

Please take action as soon as possible to avoid any inconvenience. If you require further assistance, feel free to reach out to us.

Best regards,

E-Mail Hosting Administration

- Someone must be present when the courier arrives, as they cannot leave pickups unattended.
- Make sure your packages are packed and labeled correctly to avoid any issues.
- You can also drop off your shipment at a DHL Service Point.

Please refrain from replying to this email, as this inbox is not actively monitored.

Thank you,
DHL Group

original_subject: Your QuickBooks Subscription is Expiring Today!
original_body:
Subscription Notification

Dear jose@monkey.org

Your QuickBooks Subscription is due for renewal.

Subscription Service: QuickBooks Subscription Renewal

Most Recent Billing Date: 29 April, 2025

Recently we tried to charge your credit card for your QuickBooks Subscription. The payment was not successful, which means a balance is due on your account. This can happen for several reasons. Most often, a payment method has expired.

How do I Fix the Problem?
Toll Free: +1(833) 824-0451

To continue using all the features of QuickBooks you must update your payment information. (For example, if you pay by credit card, Be sure the expiration of the card is current).

Please give us a call at +1(833) 824-0451 as soon as possible so that we may renew your subscription with updates to avoid any disruption in services

QuickBooks Billing Team

+1(833) 824-0451

What Happens Next?

We may try to charge your credit card again before your grace period expires. If the payment is not successful, your subscription will be suspended. If your subscription is cancelled, you can resubscribe after we successfully process your payment.

However, you will be charged whatever the full price is for your plan at the time that you resubscribe. Update your payment information today to ensure that you keep your current pricing

Your annual or monthly subscription or billing plan automatically renews for subsequent terms using the billing information we have on file at the time of your renewal, unless you cancel. You can cancel your subscription at any time by form or by phone: +1(833) 824-0451. Terms, conditions, pricing, features, service, and support options are subject to change without notice. See the important terms, conditions, and refund terms for more information.

If you wish to renew the subscriptions then contact our support team.

Contact Support
+1(833) 824-0451
Repart,

ï¿½ 2025 Intuit Inc. All rights reserved.

Intuit, QuickBooks, QB, TurboTax, ProConnect, and Mint are registered trademarks of Intuit Inc.

https://quickbooks.intuit.com/global/

original_subject: Important Information Regarding Your Recent Asset Transfer
original_body:
*Dear jose@monkey.org,

This email confirms that Charles Schwab has processed an asset transfer of $4,800.00 (four thousand eight hundred United States dollars).

This transfer was initiated on April 11, 2025, and is now complete.

Your system-generated transaction ID for this transfer is: AI-TRANS-7890-4321. Please keep this ID for your records if you need to refer to this transaction in the future.*

You can view the details of this transaction by logging into your Schwab account online at www.schwab.com. Once logged in, please navigate to your account activity or transaction history section.

If you did not authorize this transfer, please call us immediately at *(888) 404-0878* to cancel it.

If you have any other questions about this transfer, please do not hesitate to contact us using the number above or by replying to this email.

Thank you for choosing Charles Schwab. We appreciate your business.

*Sincerely,

The Charles Schwab Team

(888) 404-0878* **

Jennifer

response_text:
Subject: Important Notice Regarding Your PayPal Account

Dear [Recipient],

We wanted to inform you that your PayPal account has been temporarily limited due to recent changes in your account activity. We, as your payment processor, are reaching out to better understand these changes.

This account limitation may impact your ability to send or receive money from others, as well as withdraw funds. Additionally, you may not be able to remove your bank account from your PayPal account at this time.

Please take the necessary steps to resolve this issue by contacting our customer support team as soon as possible. We appreciate your cooperation in this matter.

Thank you,
PayPal Team

Please take a moment to download the file attached and upgrade your account to the new Online Banking system.
